mapper.select: SELECT layer_id AS layerId, project_id AS projectId, layer_name AS layerName, color, visible, element_ids AS elementIds, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM bim_layer WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bim_layer (layer_id, project_id, layer_name, color, visible, element_ids, sort_order) VALUES (#{layerId}, #{projectId}, #{layerName}, #{color}, #{visible}, #{elementIds}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE bim_layer SET layer_name = #{layerName}, color = #{color}, visible = #{visible}, element_ids = #{elementIds}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE layer_id = #{layerId}
mapper.select: SELECT element_id AS elementId, project_id AS projectId, color FROM bim_element_color WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
